module.name: Orders
module.description: Accepted customer orders after quote approval, with procurement and invoice links.

confirm.title: Confirm order?
confirm.body: Use this once the commercial order is agreed and ready for execution.

confirm.title: Raise purchase order?
confirm.body: This will create a supplier PO from the current order lines.

confirm.title: Raise deposit invoice?
confirm.body: This will create a draft deposit invoice linked to this order.

confirm.title: Raise final invoice?
confirm.body: This will create the final commercial invoice for the shipped order.

cards.label: Ready To Invoice
cards.subtitle: Shipped or completed without final invoice

modals.title: Put Order On Hold
modals.description: Capture why execution is being paused.

modals.title: Cancel Order
modals.description: Capture why this order is being cancelled.
